overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a medieval great hall filled with dining students, illuminated by thousands of floating candles overhead. The scene depicts a magical school dining hall with Gothic stone architecture, long wooden house tables, and a prominent red and gold banner, rendered in a video game engine.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall dining area with floating candle illumination

agents.ego_description: standing stationary at the hall entrance observing the students dining at the house tables

entered.detail: thousands of floating candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination throughout the vaulted ceiling
red and gold house banner with lion crest hanging on the central foreground table
long wooden house tables lined with dining students and food platters extending down the left side
long wooden house tables lined with dining students and food platters extending down the right side
tall Gothic stone arches and columns lining the distant hall walls with stained glass windows

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary, capturing a wide view of the Great Hall with students dining at long wooden tables. Floating candles illuminate the Gothic stone architecture overhead, while a red and gold house banner hangs prominently on the central table in the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across a magical dining hall where the atmosphere is defined by Gothic grandeur and warm, floating light. It begins with a wide, stationary view of the Great Hall, capturing students gathered at long wooden tables beneath a canopy of drifting candles. The camera lingers on the intricate stone architecture overhead while the soft glow of the lights illuminates the space. The scene remains focused on the central activity, emphasizing the prominence of a red and gold house banner draped across the foreground table.
